tasks.title: Deliver high-value secrets as bao: SecretRefs (env->OpenBao KV), fail-closed

scenarios: High-value secrets are delivered as SecretRefs, never as plaintext environment values
An unresolvable credential refuses the operation with no plaintext fallback

tasks.title: Master key via an external key service (OpenBao Transit) - the worker never holds it

scenarios: The master key never resides in the worker and seal/unseal calls the external key service

tasks.title: Just-in-time actuation SSH identity + bounded-lifetime lease (SSH-CA / OTP)

scenarios: The actuation SSH identity is resolved just-in-time and not persisted between actuations
A leased actuation credential expires after its bounded lifetime

tasks.title: Split the read-only triage plane from the actuation-credential plane (disjoint OpenBao roles)

scenarios: The read-only triage plane cannot resolve an actuation credential

tasks.title: Redact secret material on every substrate resolver error/output path

scenarios: A resolved secret value never reaches a log, export, or error output

tasks.title: cosign image-signing key stored in OpenBao; sign-on-build + verify-before-deploy

scenarios: The image-signing key is resolved from the substrate, not a plaintext CI variable
